faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Fresh Meadows?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Fresh Meadows, Queens. Most drain fly treatments can be scheduled within 24-48 hours of your call, and our technicians arrive fully equipped to begin treatment immediately upon inspection.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment includes a thorough inspection to locate breeding sites, bio-enzymatic drain treatments, mechanical cleaning of affected drains, application of targeted insecticides where necessary, and identification of moisture issues. The price varies based on property size, severity of infestation, and number of treatment areas required.

faqs.question: Why do I have drain flies in my Fresh Meadows home?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and other moist areas. Fresh Meadows homes, especially older buildings and co-ops, may have accumulated organic matter in kitchen drains, bathroom pipes, basement floor drains, or air conditioning condensate lines that provide ideal breeding conditions for these pests.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in drain fly activity within 2-3 days after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 1-2 weeks as the treatment breaks the breeding cycle. We include a follow-up inspection to ensure all breeding sites have been eliminated and provide prevention recommendations to keep drain flies from returning.
